title: cylindrolobus jensenianus
intro: Cylindrolobus jensenianus, also known as Jensen's spindle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Loganiaceae. It is native to China and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Cylindrolobus jensenianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
